Package neqsim.mcp.runners

Class OperationalStudyRunner

java.lang.Object
neqsim.mcp.runners.OperationalStudyRunner
public final class OperationalStudyRunner extends Object
MCP runner for P&ID-derived operational studies.

The runner exposes the neqsim.process.operations orchestration helpers to MCP clients. It intentionally delegates model interaction to existing NeqSim features: JSON process building, ProcessAutomation, measurement-device field inputs, existing valve logic actions, steady-state runs, and transient process execution.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

      Evaluates controller response metrics from supplied time series.
      Parameters:
      input - operational study input
      Returns:
      JSON controller tuning result

    • analyzePipeSections

      private static String analyzePipeSections(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Analyzes pipe sections that are not part of the main process model.

      This action does not require processJson. It takes a fluid definition and a pipeSections array describing pipe geometry and operating conditions (which may come from P&ID data and tagreader field data), runs a Beggs & Brill hydraulic calculation for each section, and returns velocity, pressure drop, flow regime, and utilization against a design limit.

      Parameters:
      input - study input containing fluid, pipeSections, optional fieldData and sectionTagBindings
      Returns:
      JSON result with per-section analysis and summary

    • evaluateOperatingEnvelope

      private static String evaluateOperatingEnvelope(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Evaluates process operating margins, simple margin trends, and advisory mitigations.

      This action reuses OperationalTagMap for optional plant-data application and EquipmentDesignData for optional STID or datasheet capacity values before delegating to OperationalEnvelopeEvaluator.

      Parameters:
      input - operational study input
      Returns:
      JSON result with operating envelope report

    • applyDesignCapacitiesIfProvided

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject applyDesignCapacitiesIfProvided(com.google.gson.JsonObject input, ProcessSystem process)
      Applies design capacities when supplied and tags default data sources otherwise.
      Parameters:
      input - operational study input
      process - process system to update
      Returns:
      report of applied design capacities, or null when no design capacities were supplied

    • parseMarginHistory

      private static Map<String,MarginTrendTracker> parseMarginHistory(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Parses optional margin history from marginHistory or history.
      Parameters:
      input - operational study input
      Returns:
      trackers keyed by margin key

      private static ProcessSystem buildProcess(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Builds and runs a process from a study input.

      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the process JSON is missing or the process cannot run
